title: Divas World Ceramic Novelty Christmas 13cm Planter Snowman & Moose Design 1.4L Festive Pot for Flowers, Herbs, Plants (Pack of 2)
features: Festive Novelty Planter – Celebrate the holiday season with this charming ceramic planter featuring adorable Snowman and Moose designs, amazing for adding a festive touch to your home or garden.
Versatile Use: Ideal for displaying flowers, herbs, succulents, or small indoor plants, this 14.2cm pot brings a delightful seasonal touch.
Durable Construction: Crafted from high-quality ceramic, this planter is built to withstand regular use and maintain its vibrant colours.
Thoughtful Gift: Whether for yourself or a loved one, this festive planter makes a wonderful present for the holiday season.
Easy Care: With its glazed finish, this pot is low-maintenance and simple to clean, ensuring long-lasting enjoyment.

Compact Size & Lightweight – Measuring 14.2cm in height, 13.6cm in length, and 13.4cm in width, this planter is compact yet spacious with a volume of 1.4 litres, best for small plants or decorative use.
